Dialog.name: Item_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A lightweight one-handed sword that's easy to handle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_004
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A short sword designed for thrusting. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_005
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long sword said to have slayed ancient demons. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_007
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sturdy, curved sword that can cut through iron. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_009
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Western sword with a silver blade. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A legendary knife known to few, but revered for its incredible cutting ability.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A well-worn water pipe with a bit of a musty smell.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sturdy sword that emits spiritual energy. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Western sword with a design inspired by a hero. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}High likelihood to Repel physical attacks. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An elegant sword with moon-like decorations. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_010
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A short sword made in the Heian period. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_011
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sharp sword with a reflective polish. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_012
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Japanese sword passed down by the Taira clan. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_013
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A rugged sword blessed by the god of power. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_014
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A ceremonial katana powered by the stars. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_015
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A curved sword that seems to pulsate. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_016
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Western sword with a sharp tip. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_017
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A holy sword favored by a knight-king of legend. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_018
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A reddish-gold sword that cuts through resistances. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_019
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword that strengthens magic attacks. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A fusion sword that is simple but well-forged. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword that changes attack affinity to Light. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Western sword inhabited by spirits. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_020
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Western sword found inside a great tree. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_021
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long sword that is almost see-through. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_022
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A short sword imbued with poisons. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_023
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A short sword whose slash brings disaster. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_024
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A longbow used for archery practice that is easy for beginners to use.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_025
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A lightweight short bow that is easy to handle. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_026
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bow that emits an odd sound that confuses enemies. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_027
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A longbow wrapped tightly with rattan. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_028
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A fancy bow whose arrows leave a rainbow trail. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_029
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A longbow adorned with metallic ornaments. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A short bow that is as light as a feather. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A refined Japanese bow that shoots arrows in a beautiful arc. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Shoots suction cup arrows. If it hits, it leaves a suction cup mark.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sturdy bow suited for long-range shooting. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A hunting bow that shoots arrows covered in poison. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A large bow that shakes the air with the snap of its string. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_030
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Japanese bow that has been reinforced with bamboo. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_031
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A lightweight longbow blessed by the god of wind. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_032
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A short bow made of wood and animal hides. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_033
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mystical bow enhanced by magical spells. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_034
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A large bow that produces powerful shots. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_035
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A longbow that shoots off arrows as fast as lightning. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_036
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A large, hefty bow that requires a lot of force to use. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_037
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Japanese bow whose comfortable grip calms the user. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_038
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An exquisite bow that was used by a legendary archer. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_039
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A strong bow said to have been used by the god of destruction. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Japanese bow favored by a courageous leader. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A winged bow that changes attack affinity to Light. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bow that strengthens the first magic attack of each battle. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A fusion bow that easily hits enemies' weak points. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_040
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A massive bow that is hard to handle but powerful. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_041
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Japanese bow in which the rage of a demonic spirit resides. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_042
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A magic bow that was favored by an ancient witch. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_043
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bow that temporarily boosts Accuracy/Evasion. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_044
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A longbow that changes attack affinity to Wind. For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_046
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sinister bow that brings about disaster.[n]For Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_048
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A two-handed sword that rouses the user's courage. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_049
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A great sword with exceeding length, weight, and strength. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A heavy great sword used to crush opponents. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword that can be drawn as fast as lightning. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A lightweight sword that can be used in a variety of ways. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bat with nails driven into it. Release your inner bad boy.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_050
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword with a blade[n]like a lump of iron. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_051
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A two-handed sword that is lightweight but deadly. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_052
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword with a thick, heavy blade. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_054
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An unusually long two-handed sword. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_055
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword that temporarily boosts Defense. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_056
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A deadly katana with a strangely ominous aura. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_057
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A great sword that shines mystically. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_058
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A great sword that bears the name "Hard Lightning." For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_059
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword that symbolizes turmoil. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword that boasts strong cutting ability. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A great sword made from the philosopher's stone. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword made from the bones of poison snakes. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A supreme magical sword that cuts through resistances. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A massive sword that changes attack affinity to Fire. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dark red sword that doubles the user's critical rate. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_061
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A two-handed sword that strikes enemies with a heavy blow. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_063
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword favored by a monk who saved the country. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_064
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An especially sharp sword once used to decapitate a demon. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_065
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A great sword bearing the name of a crazed warrior. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_066
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A two-handed sword that reddens its victims. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_067
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A heated sword that changes attack affinity to Fire. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_068
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sharp sword blessed by a dragon god. For Junpei.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Weaponized gloves that are simple and easy to use.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Gloves that were made from a powerful sword. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Gloves designed to overwhelm enemies with speed. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Weaponized gloves that double the user's critical rate. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Weaponized gloves with spurs like beast fangs. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Gloves that restore 1 HP upon death once per battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_070
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Cute gloves made to resemble the Jack brothers.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_071
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Weaponized gloves that strike with the power of a meteor. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_072
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Gloves that instill a strong spirit in the wearer. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_073
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Iron gloves that strengthen Strike attacks. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_074
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Weaponized gloves with sharp blades. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_075
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Magical gloves that suck the enemy's blood. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_076
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Weaponized gloves that unleash fierce power. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_078
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Weaponized gloves that specialize in destructive power. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_079
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Weaponized gloves that are as light as air. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Weaponized gloves that are as hard as diamonds. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Gloves that are the center of numerous legends. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Weaponized gloves that temporarily boost the user's critical rate.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sacred gloves that make punches stronger. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mystic hand that changes attack affinity to Ice. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_080
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Magical gloves that temporarily boost all stats. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_081
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fusion gloves suited for following up on previous attacks. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ceremonial gloves used to pray with punches. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_085
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Gloves that house the soul of a fighter. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_086
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lightweight gloves meant for executing swift combos. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_087
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Electrified gloves that change attack affinity to Electric. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_088
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Technical gloves that disrupt the opponent's pace. For Sanada.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sharp rapier designed for fighting Shadows.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A thrusting sword with a body curved like a snake. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A holy spear said to have repelled Satan. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A foreign rapier whose sting distresses enemies. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A thrusting sword befitting a noble. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A short sword made for defense. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A divine spear that strengthens Ice attacks. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An execution spear that temporarily boosts Attack. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A jet-black short spear that strengthens magic attacks. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A whip made of ice that changes attack affinity to Ice. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A refined sword with a sophisticated aura. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sinister short spear that changes attack affinity to Dark. For Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A three-finger firing mechanism that uses the latest technologies.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A six-stage, automatic firing mechanism. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A rifle that fires bullets powered by orgone energy. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cannon that fires off powerful blasts. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cannon with a uniquely long barrel. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A firing mechanism that shoots poisonous bullets. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cannon that uses electromagnetism to fire iron slugs. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Vulcan cannon with an incredibly high rate of fire. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A weapon that fires iron fists, like something out of a robot anime.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0BA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The latest model of anti-Shadow rifle. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0BB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A firearm loaded with special rounds that bewilder foes. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0BC
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A small but well-balanced rifle. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0BD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A firearm that is said to burn away impurity. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0BE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cannon that generates annihilation between particles. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0BF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sacred gun that reduces the HP cost of physical skills by half. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0C0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A grenade launcher that fires flash grenades. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0C1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A firearm with power like a kiss from a god. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0C2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A grenade launcher that launches icy grenades. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0C3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A firearm that shoots special rounds with high force of impact. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0C4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A robust firearm that shoots through resistances. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0C5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A fusion gun that has no quirks and is easy to use. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0C8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A gun that temporarily boosts Accuracy/Evasion of all allies. For Aigis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0C9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sharp knife designed for fighting Shadows.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0CA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bone full of calcium that provides strength to those who chew it.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0CC
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A knife that is said to bring good fortune. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0CD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A lethal blade shaped like a crescent moon. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0CE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A kunai that was wielded by an assassin. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0CF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A knife used to break swords. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0D0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A pitch-black kunai that seems to reject light. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0D1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A kunai that was favored by a certain ninja. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0D2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A knife developed in a foreign country. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0D3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A blade as powerful as a fierce howl. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0D5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A kunai that strengthens Slash attacks. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0D6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Raises Attack when on the receiving end of a Shift. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0D7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A tool that halves the hit rate of incoming attacks. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0D8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A fusion blade that strengthens Dark attacks. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0DB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A knife that temporarily boosts Attack. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0DC
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dagger that protects its user from misfortune. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0DD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A knife polished so thoroughly that it shines. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0DE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A kunai that changes attack affinity to Dark. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0DF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A blade that changes attack affinity to Wind. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0E0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A knife with thorough slicing ability. Should not be pointed at people.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0E1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A demonic knife that strengthens Dark attacks. For Koromaru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0E2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An easy-to-use long spear designed for fighting Shadows.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0E3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A magical spear that temporarily boosts Attack. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0E4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long-handled weapon used during Europe's middle ages. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0E5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long spear with a beautifully-shaped head. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0E6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long spear that was used by a legendary king. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0E7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sinister spear that is said to call forth death. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0E8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A common brush used for cleaning. Can also clean the area of Shadows.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0E9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long spear with superb piercing power. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0EA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cross-shaped spear with fearsome cutting ability. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0EB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A renowned spear that is long and beautiful. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0EC
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long-handled weapon with a simple shape. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0ED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long-handled weapon dipped in poison. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0EE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long spear made in the Muromachi period. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0EF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long spear that was favored by an ancient emperor. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A spear that protects the user from mental ailments. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A magical spear that changes attack affinity to Light. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A silver spear that changes attack affinity to Electric. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A trident imbued with the power of destruction and creation. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cross-shaped spear said to have belonged to royalty. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A special spear that is constantly surging with electricity. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mystical spear that grants its user magical powers. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0FA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A ceremonial lance that changes attack affinity to Light. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0FB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A destructive battle-axe designed for fighting Shadows.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0FC
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A giant hammer that emits a ferocious aura. For Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0FD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dangerous cudgel made by a psychopathic murderer. For Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0FE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It says, "Front of School." It should probably be returned someday.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0FF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A giant axe that was used for executions. For Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A rod that boasts significant strength. For Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_104
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily boosts the user's critical rate. For Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_105
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A giant hammer blessed by the god of earth. For Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_107
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A battle-axe that strengthens Strike attacks. For Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_108
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A large, metal hammer that can shatter the ground. For Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_109
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sacred hammer that changes attack affinity to Electric. For Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_10A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A staff that strengthens the first physical attack of each battle. For Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_10F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}User recovers SP when on the receiving end of a Shift. For Amada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_118
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sharp one-handed sword designed for fighting Shadows.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_119
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A powerful longbow designed for fighting Shadows.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_11A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long, heavy great sword designed for fighting Shadows.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_11B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tough weaponized gloves designed for fighting Shadows.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_122
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword that changes attack affinity to Dark. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_123
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This sword of legend... is a fake. The anger of being tricked turns into power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_124
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Medium likelihood to Repel physical attacks. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_125
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cursed sword seeped in blood. For {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_126
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sword that changes attack affinity to Light. For {f 4 2}.[n]
